rule_description: target at least 10 reviewed included candidates for batch smoke
target at most 30 reviewed included candidates for batch smoke
future shard planning uses shard size 5
current phase only allows CYS/SG covalent events
specialized covalent databases are preferred over blind PDB-wide scan
PDB covalent annotation fallback is used only after specialized source attempts
one row represents one covalent ligand-residue event
explicit covalent bond atom pair is required
ligand topology evidence is required before downstream materialization
manual review is required before include_in_smoke
duplicate or ambiguous event keys are excluded
